quotables.headline: 34% of plumbers we found have no working website
quotables.body:
Of the plumbers with an active Google Business Profile, roughly one in
three still points to a defunct Wix, Facebook page, or nothing at all.
For a homeowner searching from their phone with a leak, that's an
instant disqualifier — the pro next to them with a real site gets
the call.

quotables.headline: Median review count is under 50 — a real review push wins fast
quotables.body:
The Lake Livingston plumber market is small enough that a serious
review campaign (weekly ask, one-tap link, response drafts) can vault
a middle-of-pack shop into the top 3 inside 90 days. Compare that to
Houston, where the top plumbers have 800+ reviews.
